detectors.description:
CreditDepositBank.manager (CreditDepositBank.sol#53) is never initialized. It is used in:
	- CreditDepositBank.close() (CreditDepositBank.sol#125-135)
detectors.markdown:
[CreditDepositBank.manager](CreditDepositBank.sol#L53) is never initialized. It is used in:
	- [CreditDepositBank.close()](CreditDepositBank.sol#L125-L135)

detectors.description:
CreditDepositBank.close() (CreditDepositBank.sol#125-135) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- this.balance == 0 (CreditDepositBank.sol#129)
CreditDepositBank.close() (CreditDepositBank.sol#125-135) ignores return value by manager.send(this.balance) (CreditDepositBank.sol#127)
CreditDepositBank.credit() (CreditDepositBank.sol#111-121) ignores return value by msg.sender.send(this.balance + msg.value) (CreditDepositBank.sol#117)
CreditDepositBank.withdraw(address) (CreditDepositBank.sol#101-107) ignores return value by msg.sender.send(balances[client]) (CreditDepositBank.sol#105)
solc-0.4.26 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.
detectors.markdown: solc-0.4.26 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.17 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder
	- ZeroFunctionSelector.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.17 (CreditDepositBank.sol#1)
